raw_events.data: he community workshop opens at nine on weekdays and stays open until early evening. Members can reserve the long bench near the window, the standing desks along the back wall, or the small quiet room beside the entrance. Tools must be returned to the pegboard before closing, and the last person out is expected to switch off the compressor, stack the folding chairs, and leave a note for the morning crew.
